title: Enderman Farm
description: An enderman XP farm built on the End island or floating platforms in the End dimension. Endermen spawn naturally in the End — a large dark platform at Y=128 maximizes spawns. Endermen fall through a 3-block tall enclosure (they cannot teleport if you look through glass) into a drop chamber. A 43-block fall brings them to half a heart; the player kills them for XP and ender pearls. A water stream collects the ender pearls into hoppers. One of the best XP farms in the game.
